Video.summary: As a parent, you're likely to be concerned about sexual predators who could potentially gain access to your child. But what if you suspected a child molester were living under the same roof as your child or grandchild? Dr. Phil tackles the stories of two concerned moms.
Video.title: Is There a Predator in the House?

Image.alt: Is There a Predator in the House?
Is There a Predator in the House?
Is There a Predator in the House?
Is There a Predator in the House?
Is There a Predator in the House?
Is There a Predator in the House?
Is There a Predator in the House?

Video.summary: Imagine your pregnant teen daughter running away to be with the baby's father -- an older man whom she met online. For Heidi, this became reality when her 15-year-old daughter, Brittney, went missing for five weeks. Dr. Phil put private investigator and former FBI Agent Harold Copus on the case to find the missing teen. See the confrontation when Harold finally locates her and her 34-year-old boyfriend. Then, find out why Brittney was even more upset when she found out what was in store for her. It's been two months; has Brittney's relationship with her mother improved? Next, Kim, 15, has run away six times in the last year, most recently making it halfway across the country to be with her married boyfriend. Why didn't her parents look for her, and why does she say she'll do anything to get away from them? Can this family learn to get things back on track? Think your child is being targeted by a sexual predator? Donĺt miss Dr. Philĺs warning signs!
Video.title: Runaway Dramas

Video.summary: Laurie-Ann emailed Dr. Phil claiming she was robbed by her dangerous, narcissist ex-boyfriend and his new fiancÚe, Alison. She claims her ex, Michael, held her hostage for seven years. Laurie-Ann claims Michael and Alison are retaliating against her for breaking her silence and filing charges against Michael for domestic violence, emotional abuse, theft, and fraud. But Michael and Alison say Laurie-Ann is a liar who is always playing the victim. Michael says he never held her hostage; she only started to say that because he dumped her. Alison says she just wants Laurie-Ann to move on with her life, let them be happy, and stop stalking them. But Laurie-Ann says Alison doesnĺt know how vindictive Michael really is and she claims he has turned everyone, including the police, against her. Laurie-Ann says she wants Dr. Phil to validate her story.
Video.title: Held Hostage By My Ex

Video.summary: Tiffany says her relationship with her sonĺs father, Erik, was destroyed by his constant lyingáandáempty promises, to the point where she completely cut him off and has not seen him in over three years. Erik admits heáhas lied to his ex-girlfriends. Then, just this past year, Erik dated Sheka who says after doing research midway through their relationship, she uncoveredáhis lies and put a stop to their wedding plans. So, when did Erik begin to con and deceive people? As Erik is accused of one lie more shocking than the next, his mom, Jody, saysáher son has been lying since he was a child. And, don't miss part 2, when more women come forwardáfrom Erikĺs past.
Video.title: Our Lying Ex-Boyfriend

Video.summary: Sara says her ex-husband, Mark, has brainwashed their three grown children against her, and she just wants to reclaim a place in their lives. Mark and his new wife, Mikel, say theyĺre afraid of Sara but are willing to face her onstage with Dr. Phil. Can these exes put the past behind them and make peace? And, is Saraĺs 22-year-old daughter willing to fix their broken relationship?
Video.title: Broken Family Bonds

Video.summary: Are we raising a generation of ungrateful children? Melissaĺs sisters say her sons are the most spoiled boys in North America. They get everything they want ľ all they have to do is whine. Melissa says her kids just like toys, and she thinks her sisters may be jealous of her lifestyle. Next, Dori admits that her 13-year-old son, Parker, is spoiled. Parker says he won't take no for an answer, and even has a strategy for getting everything he wants. Find out what's behind Dori's need to spoil Parker. Then, Joan says her 14-year-old daughter, Jacquie, is a snob, and her need for trendy clothes is turning her into a materialistic monster. Plus, Lauren spends her entire paycheck shopping, but with no money in her checking account, sheĺs afraid she could be headed for trouble. Her mom, Diane, says she's not worried, it's just Lauren's way of relaxing.
Video.title: Spoiled and Entitled

Video.summary: From spending $600,000 on 3-year-old beauty queens, to pushy stage sisters and an ambitious boxing coach Ś today's guests say they go to the extremes to help the youngest members of their family excel. Meet two fathers, one whose full-time job is managing his tiny stars' careers, and the other who hand makes each and every one of his 4-year-old daughter's costumes. Are these dads bonding with their daughters or simply pushing too hard? Plus, meet several women who defiantly criticize child beauty pageants. And, hear from one overzealous sister and the father of a boxing champion once ranked first in the world. Can Dr. Phil convince these guests to step aside and strive for balance in their children's lives?
Video.title: Competing For The Title

Video.summary: Many women are itching to run to the altar, but Dr. Philĺs guests say theyĺre ready to run for the hills! Kelly is a self-proclaimed runaway bride. Sheĺs been engaged four times but says she gets cold feet before she makes it down the aisle. Rick, her current fiancÚ, proposed four years ago and is still waiting for her to set a wedding date. Kelly believes that most marriages end in divorce, and she doesnĺt want to become another statistic. Should Rick wait for her to make up her mind, or should he cut his losses and move on? Then, Chad and Candi have been engaged for over five years and have two daughters, but Chad says heĺs not ready to tie the knot. He says weddings are too expensive, but Candi says he racked up $49,000 in loans for a car, a camper and a new deck for the house. Will Chad break down and give his fiancÚe the wedding of her dreams? Plus, Dr. Phil talks to a woman who says her fiancÚ left her six days before the wedding and stuck her with a $150,000 bill -- an allegation he totally denies.
Video.title: Runaway Bride, Runaway Groom

Video.summary: These parents say their precious daughters have turned into bullies. Dr. Phil spells out how "commando parenting" will reshape the behavior of their "little mean girls."
Video.title: Little Mean Girls

Video.summary: What happens when you can't let go of a meaningful relationship from the past? What are the boundaries when getting in touch with an old flame while you're married? Although toying with old flames can get you burned, it can also be the spark that rekindles lost love.
Video.title: Old Flames

Video.summary: A mother and father desperate to save their daughter from her self-destructive behavior reach out to Dr. Phil for help. Terri and Bob say their 17-year-old daughter, Daniella, went from a sweet and innocent girl to a troubled and rebellious young woman who skips school, uses drugs and lashes out at them repeatedly. Daniella says she's struggling with her sexual identity and is afraid her parents won't accept her choices. Bob, who admits to using homophobic slurs in the past, says he loves his daughter regardless of her sexuality, and he just wants his little girl back. But did a recent argument tell a different story? What hurtful words pushed Daniella to run away from home? Watch as former Dr. Phil guests Debbie and Brandon track down Daniella and stage an intervention. Can they convince her to sit down with Dr. Phil? Will she get the acceptance she's seeking from her family? Terri and Bob are desperate to save their 17-year-old daughter, Daniella, from her self-destructive behavior. Daniella says she's struggling with her sexual identity and fears her parents won't accept her choices. Can Dr. Phil help this troubled teen?
Video.title: Saving Daniella

Video.summary: Dr. Phil wants a violent teen to meet someone who could change her life. How will she react?
Video.title: Destoniĺs Drama: Will She Accept Help? (Pt 2)

Image.alt: Destoniĺs Drama: Will She Accept Help? (Pt 2)
Destoniĺs Drama: Will She Accept Help? (Pt 2)
Destoniĺs Drama: Will She Accept Help? (Pt 2)
Destoniĺs Drama: Will She Accept Help? (Pt 2)
Destoniĺs Drama: Will She Accept Help? (Pt 2)
Destoniĺs Drama: Will She Accept Help? (Pt 2)
Destoniĺs Drama: Will She Accept Help? (Pt 2)

Video.summary: When he last appeared on Dr. Phil, Kipĺs brazen and outrageous tirade toward his 17-year-old stepdaughter, Tory, shocked audience members and viewers. But the married father of two refused to back down. When Tory broke down in tears, Kip finally agreed to find a calmer way to express his frustration. Just weeks later, Toryĺs mother, Vicky, says the surly relationship has not only gotten worse, the hostility has escalated, and her patience is running thin. She says both Tory and Kip refuse to seek help, and now there is a new bombshell that is making their home life virtually unbearable. What does Kip say is his biggest issue with his stepdaughter? And, will this family finally agree to accept help and repair whatĺs left of their relationship? Then, Joe, 34, became an instant father to two teenage daughters. One of the girls has run away, and the other feels that he treats her like a slave. Can they resolve their disputes and come together as one? (FOLLOW UP FROM 9093)
Video.title: My Teen Canĺt Stand Her Stepfather

Image.alt: My Teen Canĺt Stand Her Stepfather
My Teen Canĺt Stand Her Stepfather
My Teen Canĺt Stand Her Stepfather
My Teen Canĺt Stand Her Stepfather
My Teen Canĺt Stand Her Stepfather
My Teen Canĺt Stand Her Stepfather
My Teen Canĺt Stand Her Stepfather

Video.summary: Dr. Phil debates viewers who disagree with the advice he gave to previous guests. One woman feels he had no right to push his view of adoption on pregnant 15-year-old, Alexandra. Another woman accuses Dr. Phil of bullying the participants on the Weight Loss Challenge and even accuses him of disliking fat people! What does Dr. Phil say about her inflated accusations? Then a 16-year-old bi-racial girl disputes Dr. Philĺs advice to a mother facing a racial identity crisis. How will these viewers fare when they go head to head with Dr. Phil?
Video.title: Debate Dr. Phil

Video.summary: Em says her husband, Shawn, has cheated on her with at least 78 women -- so why does she keep taking him back? Shawn admits to at least 20 affairs but says itĺs his wifeĺs fault that he strays.
Video.title: Why Men Cheat

Video.summary: Parents suspect foul play in their daughter's alleged death by suicide.
Video.title: DP Mystery: Morganĺs Murder

Video.summary: A mom is supposed to love and nurture her children, but what if she's too involved? Reed, 33, says his mother, Margaret, is so meddling, manipulative and controlling that the day she dies will be a cause for celebration, not mourning. He claims she uses bribes to control his every move, including offering him $20,000 to divorce his first wife. Margaret admits that she can be pushy and difficult but says she just wants to see her son succeed in life. Is she really setting him up for failure? Does Reed really want to man-up and break free from his mother's grasp? And, is Margaret willing to let him go? Then, 35-year-old Anthony, star of the new TLC reality show Mama's Boys of the Bronx, says he sees nothing wrong with living at home and letting his mom, Patti, wait on him hand and foot. How does Patti feel about their living arrangement? Will she ever kick Anthony out? Plus, hear how Anthony's lifestyle affects his dating life. If you know of a mother-son bond that's a little too close for comfort, don't miss this Dr. Phil. Reed, 33, says his mother, Margaret, is so meddling and controlling that the day she dies will be a cause for celebration. Margaret says she wants to see her son succeed - but is she setting him up for failure? Plus, 35-year-old Anthony, star of TLC's Mama's Boys of the Bronx, says he sees nothing wrong with living at home.
Video.title: Over The Top Moms

Video.summary: The conversation continues with DĺAndre, who blames his abusive relationship with his ex-girlfriend, Autumn, on her upbringing.
Video.title: Dad Confronts Daughterĺs Abuser (Pt 2)

Video.summary: We've all heard of in-laws who don't get along, but these guests say their problems have become scary and even life-threatening.
Video.title: In-Law Threats!

Video.summary: Darcy says that her sister, Jenniferĺs, home is in a state of complete chaos. She says Jennifer and her husband, Ralph, have no rules, their kitchen is bare, the electricity is often shut off, and they put their needs ahead of those of their four children -- who are acting out as a result. Darcy says her nephews, 8 and 10, smoke marijuana, play with weapons and recently started a local forest fire -- and that the 10-year-old once wrote a note asking for someone to kill him in his sleep. She says her 12-year-old niece was recently called to truancy court, and her 16-year-old niece is having unprotected sex in the home with her older, live-in boyfriend. Ralph concedes that heĺs struggling to provide for his family financially and has made mistakes as a parent, but says Jennifer is to blame, claiming sheĺs checked out as a mother. Jennifer admits sheĺs detached from her family, struggles with depression and has trouble maintaining the household. With this family in dire need of a resolution, Dr. Phil stages a no-nonsense intervention. Are Jennifer and Ralph willing to take the necessary steps to save their family?
Video.title: Parenting Disasters

Video.summary: Three wives send their husbands to Dr. Phil's Man Camp for an attitude adjustment.
Video.title: Man Camp Part 1

Video.summary: Fifty-six-year-old widow Sebrina says sheĺs in love with her overseas boyfriend of one year, ôJames,ö whom she has talked to online and over the phone but has never met in person. Sebrina admits she has sent ôJamesö more than $250,000 -- emptying her life savings -- but believes he will pay her back, as promised, when he pays off business debt, returns to the United States and marries her. Sebrinaĺs daughter, Sarah, says sheĺs at her witsĺ end trying to convince her mother that sheĺs being scammed -- even presenting evidence to prove it -- but Sebrina continues to send ôJamesö money. Dr. Phil enlists the help of private investigator Doug Kane to look into ôJamesĺö claims and find the truth. Has Sebrina fallen victim to a catfish? Plus, donĺt miss what happens when Dr. Phil confronts ôJamesö over the phone!
Video.title: Hooked By A Catfish

Video.summary: Who will Brad choose: his wife or girlfriend?
Video.title: Torn Between 2 Lovers Part 1

Video.summary: Horrific allegations are tearing a family apart Ś but who is telling the truth? Todd says he was shocked and appalled when his ex-girlfriend's mother, Diana, accused him of molesting his 4-year-old daughter, Taniya, and turns to Dr. Phil to help clear his name. Diana says that while babysitting Taniya, the toddler detailed ways in which Todd inappropriately touched her, and she's convinced he's done the unthinkable. After learning of the accusations, Taniya's mom, Latia, reported the alleged sexual abuse to a judge who immediately stripped Todd of his parental rights Ś but was justice served? Latia says that as much as she wants to believe Todd's innocence, as a mother, she needs to take every precaution to protect her child. A year has passed since he's seen his daughter, and Todd says he will go to any length to prove his innocence, including taking another a lie detector test Ś even though he's already passed one. He's adamant that Diana is lying and says that she coached Taniya to make the accusations. Dr. Phil calls in an expert polygraph examiner. Don't miss the shocking results!
Video.title: Accusations & Polygraphs

Video.summary: Do you have a nosy loved one in your life snooping through your things, questioning your every move and driving you crazy? Dr. Phil has advice.
Video.title: Mind Your Business

Video.summary: Maryĺs 30-year-old daughter, Lynn, claims to be suffering from numerous medical conditions, including stomach cancer, heart disease, uterine cancer, rheumatoid arthritis and other ailments -- but Mary believes itĺs all lies, concocted to gain money and attention. Mary says she has found no evidence of her daughterĺs health conditions and was horrified to learn that Lynn had created a crowdfunding website, asking for donations for medical expenses. Lynn insists sheĺs gravely ill and says it sickens her even more that her mother doesnĺt believe her. The mother and daughter face each other for the first time in a year on Dr. Philĺs stage. Dr. Phil reviews Lynnĺs medical records -- how does she explain the inconsistencies? And, how can Lynn find a return to health and start living again?
Video.title: ôMy Daughter is Lying about Cancerö

Image.alt: ôMy Daughter is Lying about Cancerö
ôMy Daughter is Lying about Cancerö
ôMy Daughter is Lying about Cancerö
ôMy Daughter is Lying about Cancerö
ôMy Daughter is Lying about Cancerö
ôMy Daughter is Lying about Cancerö
ôMy Daughter is Lying about Cancerö

Video.summary: Dr. Phil's guests haven't even been married a year and are already wondering if itĺs time to call it quits.
Video.title: The Honeymoonĺs Over

Video.summary: Brenda says she fell in love with and married her husband, Don ľ despite their 26-year age gap. But soon after, she claims her ôPrince Charmingö turned ôcrazyö and ôtemperamental.ö Is their age difference at the root of their issues? Then, Bev says sheĺs concerned for her sister, Melanie, who married her much younger man, Devar, after meeting him on a Jamaican vacation. Is Devar in it for love, or for a green card and money? And, Dr. Phil catches up with best-selling author Mitch Albom.
Video.title: Regret Marrying Older Spouse

Video.summary: Secrets are revealed in a family with a shopaholic wife and rageaholic husband.
Video.title: Family Secrets, Family Lies

Video.summary: Eighteen-year-old Atira is being accused of tearing her family apart. Her mother, Yolanda, sister, Alexa, and brother, Stuart, say the young mom is a "lazy slob," who yells, shoves and cusses, and theyĺre tired of the chaos she creates. Atira admits sheĺs full of anger but says her family makes no effort to understand her. Is Atira just an out-of-control, bratty teen, or is a dark secret from her past causing her to lash out? When Dr. Phil digs into this familyĺs history, will Yolanda, Alexa and Stuart begin to better understand Atira? Then, Atira confronts Yolanda for ignoring her cries for help as a child. Where was her mom when she says she needed her most? Will mother and daughter find a common ground on which to rebuild their relationship? Then, former prosecutor Loni Coombs, author of the new book, ôYouĺre Perfectö ... and Other Lies Parents Tell, joins Dr. Phil. Learn about her six parenting tips for effective listening. Plus, find out how a marshmallow can help you learn critical information about your childĺs future, and the most important thing Dr. Phil says you must do with your child every day.
Video.title: A Family Secret & Struggle

Video.summary: Jessica says her mother, Patricia, claims she is defying the odds by becoming a record-setting weight lifter while simultaneously battling Stage 3 brain cancer. But Jessica insists her mother isnĺt sick at all and that she is lying about her health to gain sympathy and attention. She says Patricia has been spinning stories about various medical ailments for as long as she can remember -- and itĺs time to come clean. Patricia strongly denies her daughterĺs accusations and insists her diagnosis and incredible survival story are real. Why does she claim Jessica is out to get her? Emotions run high when mother and daughter meet on Dr. Philĺs stage. Do Patriciaĺs claims hold up? And, can this mother and daughter repair their fractured relationship?
Video.title: Why Is My Mom Faking Cancer?

Image.alt: Why Is My Mom Faking Cancer?
Why Is My Mom Faking Cancer?
Why Is My Mom Faking Cancer?
Why Is My Mom Faking Cancer?
Why Is My Mom Faking Cancer?
Why Is My Mom Faking Cancer?
Why Is My Mom Faking Cancer?

Video.summary: TV Star Nicholas Brendon has been starring in his own private alcohol-fueled drama which has led to multiple arrests and been documented in celebrity magazines, social media and blogs. Nicholas sits down with Dr. Phil -- and abruptly walks offstage. Is Nicholas ready to take the steps needed to save his life and career?
Video.title: TV Star's Alcoholism Spirals
